note: Grown from her chronicle. Every addition sits in one of the four places she actually lived in, and every hook collides two facts that were already in the tree. Nothing here is invented; it is what was already true, followed one step further.

node.name: Struck Ford
node.one_line: A town of people who are not on the roll

economy.who_is_rich: the man who copies the roll out each spring
economy.who_pays_for_it: the people already struck off it, who are struck off it again

node.aesthetic: dry mud, a dry channel, a queue at a well that does not run

divergences.why: the roll is copied by hand every spring, and a name is easier to leave out than to strike

node.name: Ovett the Copyist
node.one_line: He copies the water roll out by hand each spring
node.here: He has never struck a name. He has, twice, failed to copy one
node.known_for: keeping the only draft, which is not the same as the roll
node.wants: to be asked, once, by somebody who could not make him
node.will_do_anything_for: his own name staying on it

node.name: Sera of the Rendered
node.status: alive, and legally still a man
node.one_line: She has been becoming the fuel for eleven years
node.here: She is warm to the touch in winter and the refineries have made her an offer
node.known_for: reading her own assay report out loud in a public house
node.wants: to be buried, rather than sold

node.name: Dovic Kell
node.one_line: He runs a cell that believes it invented its own name
node.here: He has found three orders he did not write, in a hand he half recognises
node.known_for: keeping the orders instead of burning them
node.wants: to know who he has been working for

node.name: The Intact Works
node.one_line: The works nobody burned, and everybody wants

economy.who_is_rich: the four crews who hold the doors
economy.who_pays_for_it: the crews who go in now, at the rate of one in nine

node.aesthetic: cold metal in a warm room, and a hum you feel in the jaw

divergences.why: it was never built here and it was never burned, and those are the same sentence

node.name: Halda Vott
node.one_line: She sends the money to a leadership she has disowned
node.here: Estranged from the Company, and eleven years current on her dues
node.known_for: posting the dues herself, in person, so nobody else has to
node.wants: to stop, and to be told she may

era.name: The Vott Holding
era.why_it_ended: the seam under it was godash, and they sold the ground out from beneath the houses
era.became: a refinery, and a name that only one person still uses as a place

facts: the Rendered are becoming the fuel, slowly, and legally they are still men
the economy of Haltford is godash, and the bill is paid by the Waste diggers
hook.collision: the fuel is people, and the diggers have started to work that out

facts: Oren Rook is known for wanting to know what the chord is
Embercraft costs: the residue attracts attention, and the attention is not human
hook.collision: the thing he has been listening for has been listening back

facts: she told a room the fuel is running out, and one person had done the arithmetic
The Quiet Office are hunting her, and they hold the only complete copy of the tax roll
hook.collision: they are not hunting her for what she did. they are hunting her for what she said.

lines: a week on the well-line at {place} for {coin} coin. she carried water past people who are not allowed to drink it.
she copied names for a clerk at {place} for {coin} coin, and did not ask what the list was for, and knows.
{coin} coin at {place} hauling {commodity}. the man beside her was warm to the touch, and did not mention it, and neither did she.
{place}. she passed the queue at the well and did not look at it, and has been thinking about not looking at it since.
a day in {place} and the hum in her jaw again, and she has stopped pretending she cannot hear it.
she walked {place} end to end and counted the houses with no name on the door. she stopped counting at forty.
they asked for her name at {place} and she gave one, and watched him write it down, and it was not hers.
her name was on the roll at {place} this spring. she checked. she has started checking.
